center.name: Dolores, Buenos Aires
center.summary: Dolores is a town in Buenos Aires Province, Argentina.

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Hudson's canastero (Asthenes hudsoni) is a Near Threatened species of bird in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in grasslands in Argentina, Brazil, and Uruguay.Remsen, J
